title: JRN FK-Shuffling Confound Control on rel-f1
summary: Demo notebook analyzing pre-computed JRN FK-Shuffling experiment results on the rel-f1 (Formula 1) dataset. Demonstrates the full analysis pipeline: extracting per-join JRN decompositions (structural vs feature components) for 13 FK joins across 3 driver tasks, running paired t-tests and Wilcoxon tests for statistical significance, computing Spearman correlations between structural JRN and fanout statistics, generating domain-specific interpretations, and visualizing results with 4-panel plots (decomposition bars, normal-vs-shuffled scatter, JRN heatmap, structural distribution). Uses mini_demo_data.json containing all 13 join results from LightGBM probe experiments with 3 seeds and 5 shuffles each.
